title: [Nyessem, Chimeric Empowerment]
description: The white stone walls glitter with a rainbow of fine, inset gemstone scattered unevenly in varied constellations.  At the area's center, a matte ironwood-veined basalt plinth and a marble-grafted polished faewood pedestal rise from the floor.  A slight recess is carved into the floor around these pillars, and within it burns a singular long and narrow fire that alights the room.
